expectations.text: Chooses a hook (not a skill) because the user wants automatic enforcement
expectations.evidence: PreToolUse hook approach chosen; automatic enforcement justified

expectations.text: Chooses PreToolUse event (not PostToolUse) because it must block before execution
expectations.evidence: PreToolUse explicitly chosen for hard blocking

expectations.text: Provides a shell script that checks git push commands for main/master patterns
Uses non-zero exit (exit 1 or exit 2) to block the tool call
Includes exit 0 for non-matching commands to avoid accidental blocking
